scores.correctness_notes: Covers all required fields, all three protocol types with correct location formats, and matches gold standard accurately. Extra details like service exclusion syntax and Python charm example are valid additions.
scores.hallucination_notes: The service exclusion syntax 'services: [all, -debug-svc, -noisy-svc]' is not confirmed in the gold standard and may be fabricated. Minor risk but uncertain enough to dock 1 point.
